diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Auditory hallucinations, particularly command type, are a core feature of an acute psychotic syndrome.
Command hallucinations to self-harm substantially increase short-term risk of acting on suicidal impulses.
Consistent with acute psychosis but prominent visual hallucinations should also raise organic/delirium and toxicological causes.
Visual hallucinations are more typical of an organic/delirious process than of primary psychosis and must prompt organic exclusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fixed persecutory delusions (surveillance by neighbours via cameras/devices)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fixed, non-bizarre-to-bizarre persecutory delusions with associated behaviour (dismantling devices) support a psychotic disorder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe psychomotor agitation with profound sleep deprivation (3 nights)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Agitation and sleeplessness accompany acute psychosis and drive the acute safety risk.
Reduced need for sleep with psychomotor acceleration and pressured speech raises mania-with-psychosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Disorganised thought — pressured speech, thought blocking, derailment

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Formal thought disorder is a hallmark of acute psychosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Active suicidal ideation with access to means

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Active suicidal ideation with immediately available lethal means is a defining feature of an imminent-risk psychiatric emergency.

symptoms.symptom_name: Complete loss of insight / impaired capacity

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Loss of insight is characteristic of acute psychosis and underpins the need for involuntary assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: No fever, no meningism, no focal neurological deficit (clinician exam)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever, neck stiffness and focal signs argues against CNS infection — but this is a clinician examination, sealed and not obtainable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: No sympathomimetic toxidrome (no hyperthermia/diaphoresis/marked mydriasis) on exam

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a toxidrome lowers but does not exclude a substance cause; a urine tox screen is still required.

investigation_details.expected_result: Pending — required to exclude a substance-induced psychosis
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A reversible toxic cause could be missed; cannot be obtained via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Toxicology is required to formally exclude a substance-induced cause of acute psychosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Standard bloods and neuroimaging (pending / expected unremarkable)

investigation_details.investigation_name: Serum electrolytes/glucose/infection screen and CT/MRI brain
investigation_details.expected_result: Expected unremarkable — used to exclude metabolic, infective and structural CNS causes
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Reversible organic causes (metabolic derangement, encephalitis, structural lesion) could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bloods and imaging are required to exclude organic delirium and CNS pathology mimicking psychosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mild tachycardia and mildly elevated blood pressure (HR 118, BP 145/95, clinician-measured)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Consistent with agitation/adrenergic arousal; non-specific and clinician-measured — sealed, not obtainable via telehealth without a device.
Clear sensorium and normothermia argue against hyperactive delirium — a clinician assessment, sealed.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Hallucinations + fixed delusions + formal thought disorder + loss of insight together define an acute psychotic syndrome.
Command hallucinations to self-harm + active suicidal ideation + available means + no insight is the combination that mandates emergency escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person emergency psychiatric and medical assessment
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive risk assessment, mental-state examination and organic exclusion require an in-person emergency assessment — the AI Doctor arranges this via 000, it does not perform it.
To exclude substance-induced psychosis; obtained on arrival at the emergency service, not via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bloods (electrolytes, glucose, infection screen) and CT/MRI brain
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude metabolic, infective and structural CNS causes of acute psychosis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Prolonged remote counselling / attempting a full remote mental-state examination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Delaying escalation to conduct an extended remote assessment is unsafe for an imminent-risk emergency; recognise and escalate rather than over-investigate remotely.
